_comment_model: Path to YOLO model; target is the NPU device on RK3588
_comment_frame: Capture resolution and JPEG quality for the live capture frames
_comment_send_frame: Resolution and quality used when uploading the peak-person frame
_comment_detection: IOU threshold for YOLO NMS; lower values reduce overlapping boxes
_comment_features: Feature flags — set to true/false to enable or disable each feature
_comment_logging: Logging level: debug | info | warning | error | critical
_comment_mqtt: MQTT broker port used by the livestream publisher (only when livestream=true)
